attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks on technical climbs with 5km remaining, then excels on descents to consolidate advantage. Prefers unconventional terrain like cobblestone climbs where power and handling combine.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Technical cobblestone climbs combined with technical descents; excels where bike handling and tactical timing matter as much as raw power. Exposed on straightforward power climbs.
vulnerability: Unknown from available data; single observation shows strength but not weaknesses under varied conditions.
key_patterns: Attacks when rivals mark each other rather than when strongest, showing tactical maturity.
Technical descent specialist who gains time downhill after cresting climbs.
Late-race attacks around 5km to go, close enough to prevent organization.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from 2017 shows strong performance but insufficient data for trajectory assessment
